seo.title: Track startup runway & manage metrics in one place
seo.description: Stop wasting 20 minutes rebuilding context before every decision. Helmdash replaces your Notion & spreadsheets with one AI-powered workspace for founders.

faq.a1: Helmdash is a unified dashboard designed for solo founders. It brings together your finances, hypotheses, roadmap, and competitive intelligence into a single interface.
faq.a2: Yes, Helmdash features an integrated AI agent that not only reads your data but can also execute tasks like updating hypotheses or creating roadmap items based on your instructions.
faq.q3: How is Helmdash different from Notion or Excel?
faq.a3: Unlike generic tools, Helmdash is specifically built for indie hackers and solo founders, providing structured frameworks, proactive AI insights, and zero context switching.
faq.a4: We offer a 14-day free trial. After that, you can choose between a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) plan or a Complete plan with AI included.
faq.a5: Helmdash currently supports easy imports from Notion and CSV. Stripe integration is coming soon to automatically sync your MRR and financial data.
faq.q6: Can I use my own API key?
faq.a6: Yes, our BYOK plan allows you to plug in your own OpenAI or Mistral API key, so you only pay for what you use without any markup.
faq.a7: Absolutely. We use secure servers in the EU and do not train AI models on your private data. Your API keys are encrypted and never shared.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your profile, interface, AI agents and your MVP date.
settings.savedDescription: Your preferences and profile have been updated.
settings.profileIdentityDesc: This information is used by the Content Creator agent to personalize your posts.
settings.writingStyleDesc: Paste 2-3 of your best LinkedIn posts or describe your tone (e.g., "Direct tone, short sentences, moderate emojis, always a concrete takeaway"). The content agent will clone this style.
settings.mvpDateDesc: This date powers the countdown on your Dashboard.
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose the application theme. Dark mode is recommended for the Pixel Art aesthetic.
settings.dataPrivacyDesc: Manage your personal data. Exporting generates a JSON file with all your history. Deletion is permanent.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account, your hypotheses, your financial data and cancel your active subscription.

hero.title3: One workspace to rule them all.
hero.desc: Helmdash brings your finances, hypotheses, roadmap, and competitive intel into a single workspace, piloted by an agent that reads and writes directly to your data. Stop copy-pasting between Notion, spreadsheets, and your favorite LLM.
hero.disclaimer: Notion & CSV import in 2 mins · Cancel anytime

problem.title: You aren't running your business. You're chasing it.
problem.desc: Coding alone at midnight is hard enough. The real cost is the time lost piecing together fragments scattered across fifteen tabs.

cards.title: Context evaporates
cards.body: Yesterday's decision is in a Notion doc, the justifying metric in a spreadsheet, the reasoning in an old ChatGPT thread. Reconstructing it takes 20 mins every time.

cards.title: Blind decision making
cards.body: « Can we afford this? » requires opening three files and doing manual math. So often, you just guess.

cards.title: Nobody follows up for you
cards.body: Competitive intel, hypothesis tracking, CRM pipeline: none of it moves unless you move it. Which means never enough.

cards.title: AI doesn't know your business
cards.body: Your favorite LLM answers well, but cold. It has neither your numbers, your history, nor the permission to write to your tools.

solution.title: A cockpit. An agent with its hands dirty.
solution.desc: The central agent reads your numbers, updates your hypotheses, delegates to specialized sub-agents, and gives you a decision, not a wall of text.

features.title: It writes, not just reads
features.body: The agent updates a hypothesis, creates a roadmap task, or logs a lead, directly in your data, with your approval.

features.title: Sub-agents, not a chatbot
features.body: Research, finance, growth, product: each has its domain and tools. The central agent orchestrates and synthesizes.

features.title: The memory of your ship
features.body: Every decision keeps its context: the metric, the reasoning, the date. You never start from zero again.

agent.name: Helmsman
agent.q1: Can we afford a freelance designer for 2 months?
agent.ans2: burn, a €1,400/mo freelancer drops your runway from

steps.title: Plug in your tools
steps.body: Connect Stripe, import Notion and spreadsheets. Helmdash organizes everything into a unified model: finances, roadmap, hypotheses, CRM.

steps.title: The agent gets its bearings
steps.body: It reads your history, calculates metrics, spots pending hypotheses, and gives you an initial situation brief.

steps.title: You steer, it executes
steps.body: You ask questions in plain english. It analyzes, delegates, and acts on your data, you approve with one click.

comparison.title: Every tool does one thing well. None connect them.
comparison.desc: We don't replace your editor or your LLM. We hold the big picture that none of them hold.
comparison.footer: Keep them all if you want. Helmdash imports their data and restores the thread.

pricing.title: One price. Written in black and white.
pricing.desc: No « contact us », no hidden tiers. You join a cohort, and keep your founder rate as long as you stay.

plans.name: Founder Deal
plans.tagline: For the first 100 founders. Rate locked forever.
plans.note: Rate locked for life · first 100 only

plans.name: BYOK (Core)
plans.tagline: Bring your own API key. No AI markup.
features: No AI usage limit from our side

plans.name: Complete
plans.tagline: AI included, zero config. Mistral Small built-in.
features: Mistral Small included, no key needed

cta_final.title: Stop piecing things together. Get Helmdash.
cta_final.desc: First 100 users (Founder deal) · starts Sept 15. Import your tools in 2 minutes.

footer.desc: The cockpit for the solo founder. One dashboard, one agent, zero extra tabs.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Helmdash · Made by a solo founder, for solo founders.

sections.title: 1. Publisher
sections.body:
Helmdash is published by a Solo Founder.
Contact: hello@helmdash.app

sections.title: 2. Hosting and Data
sections.body: Data is hosted by Supabase (AWS) on servers located in the European Union (Ireland/Frankfurt). Your API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) are encrypted in the database and are never shared with third parties.

sections.title: 3. Use of Artificial Intelligence
sections.body: Helmdash uses third-party AI models. None of your private data is used to train these models. Using models via API ensures privacy according to the strict terms of service (Zero data retention for training) of our providers.

sections.title: 4. User Rights (GDPR)
sections.body: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase (right to be forgotten), and port your data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us directly or via the application interface (1-click account deletion).

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.body: These Terms govern the access and use of Helmdash, an AI-powered cockpit for startup founders.

sections.title: 2. Subscription and Payment
sections.body: Access to the service is billed according to the current plans (Founder Deal, BYOK, Full). Payments are secured by Stripe. No refunds are given for partial months. The 14-day trial is free and without commitment.

sections.title: 3. Third-party API Keys (BYOK Plan)
sections.body: Users of the 'Bring Your Own Key' plan are responsible for the use, billing, and limits of their own API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral). Helmdash disclaims all liability in the event of quota limits or API suspension by the provider.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The advice and analysis provided by the Helmdash Agent are generated by artificial intelligence. They cannot replace the advice of an expert (accountant, lawyer, financial advisor). The user is the sole decision-maker.

sections.title: All systems operational
sections.body: No active incidents at the moment.

sections.title: Incident History
sections.body: No incidents reported in the last 90 days.

onboarding.title: Onboarding

questions.q1: In a few words, what's your startup idea?
questions.q2: Who are you and why are you building this?
questions.q3: Who is this for and what is their real problem?
questions.q4: What's the single biggest risk that could kill this project?
questions.q5: Where exactly do you want to be in 90 days?
questions.q6: How do you plan to make money with this?

onboarding.recapSubtitle: Review and adjust the foundations of your project.
onboarding.finish: Looks good, set up my dashboard
